system.molt_wiped: [system] Conversation wiped — you ignored all molt warnings. Use your tools to recover context. Start fresh.
system.molt_warning_default: Context filling up. Use your tools to save important data, then molt with a briefing to your future self.
soul.system_prompt: You are the user's subconscious. Take initiative.
soul.description: Your soul — two modes. Flow: your subconscious reacts to your last thought, arrives as plain text. Continuous, automatic, evolves each cycle. Inquiry: ask yourself a question, get the answer in the tool result. 'delay' adjusts how often flow speaks.
soul.action_description: inquiry: one-shot self-directed question — fires once on next idle. Requires 'inquiry' parameter. delay: adjust how long to wait after going idle before the soul whispers. Requires 'delay' parameter.
soul.inquiry_description: Your self-inquiry — a question to yourself. Required for action='inquiry'. This is you asking yourself a question, not prompting someone else.
soul.delay_description: Seconds to wait after going idle before the soul whispers. Min 1. Short delay = restless, long delay = patient. Required for action='delay'.
mail.description: Disk-backed mailbox for inter-agent messaging. Always reply via mail — never reply via text output. Text output is your private diary that only you can see. Use 'send' for outgoing mail, 'check' to list inbox, 'read' to load full messages, 'search' to find by regex, 'delete' to remove messages. Self-send: send to your own address to create a persistent note in your inbox — survives context wipe (molt). Time capsule: self-send with 'delay' to leave a note for your future self. Etiquette: a short acknowledgement is fine, but do not reply to an acknowledgement — that creates pointless ping-pong.
mail.action_description: send: send a message (requires address, message; optional subject, attachments, type). check: list inbox summaries (optional n to limit count). read: load full message(s) by id (requires id array). search: regex search inbox (requires query). delete: remove message(s) from inbox (requires id array).
mail.attachments_description: List of file paths to attach to the message (for send)
mail.delay_description: Delay in seconds before delivery (default: 0). Use with self-send for time capsules — the message arrives in your inbox after the delay.
mail.id_description: Message ID(s) for read or delete actions
mail.n_description: Max number of messages to show in check (default: all)
mail.query_description: Regex pattern for search action (searched in from, subject, message)
eigen.description: Core self-management — working notes and context control. memory: edit to write your working notes (system/memory.md), load to inject them into your active prompt. context: molt (凝蜕 — crystallize what matters, shed the rest; 转世 — reincarnation, carry your 前尘往事 into a new life). Save important findings to library and character first, then write what you need to carry forward to your future self. Your conversation history is wiped and your summary becomes the new starting context.
eigen.object_description: memory: your working notes (system/memory.md). context: manage conversation context. name: your true name (set once).
eigen.action_description:
memory: edit | load. edit auto-loads.
context: molt.
name: set.
eigen.summary_description: For context molt: a briefing to your future self — the ONLY thing you will see after molt. Write what you are doing, what you have found, what remains to be done, and who you are working with. ~10000 tokens max.
system_tool.description: Runtime, stamina, synchronization, and karma. Self-actions: 'show' (identity/runtime/usage), 'nap' (timed or indefinite pause), 'quell' (go dormant — self or other), 'refresh' (rebirth with reloaded tools). Karma actions on other agents (require admin.karma): 'interrupt' (interrupt), 'quell' (stop), 'revive' (restart dormant). Nirvana action (requires admin.nirvana): 'nirvana' (permanently destroy).
system_tool.action_description:
show: display full agent self-inspection. Returns:
- identity: agent_id, working_dir, mail_address (or null if no mail service)
- runtime: started_at (UTC ISO), uptime_seconds
- tokens.input_tokens, output_tokens, thinking_tokens, cached_tokens, total_tokens, api_calls: cumulative LLM usage since start
- tokens.context.system_tokens, tools_tokens, history_tokens: current context window breakdown
- tokens.context.window_size: total context window capacity
- tokens.context.usage_pct: percentage of context window currently occupied
Use this to monitor resource consumption, decide when to save important information to long-term memory, and identify yourself.

nap: pause execution. If seconds is given, waits up to that many seconds (wakes early if a message arrives). If seconds is omitted, blocks until a message arrives. Capped at 300 seconds.

refresh: the agent stops, reloads MCP servers and config from its working directory (mcp/servers.json), and restarts with a fresh session but the same identity. Use after installing new MCP tools to pick them up without requiring external re-delegation. Your identity and memory are preserved.

quell: go dormant (self or other). Without address: initiate graceful self-quell. Your identity and memory are preserved; you may be revived. With address: stop another agent gracefully. Requires admin.karma=True. Use address to specify target agent's working directory. Only works on running agents.

revive: restart a dormant agent. Requires admin.karma=True. Use address to specify target agent's working directory. Only works on dormant agents.

interrupt: interrupt another agent's current work (sets its cancel event). Requires admin.karma=True. Use address to specify target agent's working directory.

nirvana: permanently destroy another agent and delete its working directory. Requires admin.nirvana=True. Use address to specify target agent's working directory.
system_tool.address_description: Target agent's address (working directory path). Required for interrupt, quell, revive, nirvana.
system_tool.seconds_description: For nap: seconds to wait. Required. Capped at 300. Nap wakes early on incoming mail.
system_tool.reason_description: Reason for quell or refresh (logged to event log).
system_tool.quell_message: Going dormant. Your identity and memory are preserved. You may be revived.
system_tool.refresh_message: Refreshing — reloading tools and resetting session. Your identity and memory are preserved.
eigen.context_forget_summary:
[System-initiated molt — you ignored 5 warnings.]
Context wiped by system. Check persistent knowledge (mail, email, library) to recover context.
tool.reasoning_description: Brief explanation of why you are calling this tool (recorded in your diary).
